author: @matthewellisor5835
text:
Congrats! Looks like with a little tuning you might break the kph threshold. :D
Joking aside, I wish we had more willing to just give it a go and with your level of enthusiasm.
I'll be right there with you, my brothers across the pond. My next build will be your mechanical inverter and a handful of MOSFETs as a three-phase motor controller.
